customSections.title: Contacts Access
customSections.content: The Application requests access to your contacts to help you remember and stay in touch with your friends. Contact data is stored locally on your device and is not transmitted to external servers. You can revoke contacts access at any time through your device settings.

customSections.title: Photo Recognition
customSections.content: The Application uses AI-powered photo recognition to help you catalog and organize your home inventory. Photos are processed on your device and may be synced via iCloud if you have enabled iCloud synchronization. No photos are transmitted to third-party servers beyond what is required for the AI recognition feature.

customSections.title: iCloud Sync
customSections.content: If you choose to enable iCloud synchronization, your inventory data will be stored in your personal iCloud account. Apple's iCloud privacy policy applies to this data. You can disable iCloud sync at any time within the Application settings.

customSections.title: Photo Processing
customSections.content: The Application allows you to take or upload photos of yourself to generate AI-powered style variations. Your photos are securely transmitted to fal.ai's servers solely for the purpose of generating the styled images. Photos are not stored permanently on our servers and are not used for any purpose other than generating the requested style variations. You can revoke camera and photo library access at any time through your device settings.

customSections.title: Credits and Purchases
customSections.content: The Application uses a credit system to manage image generation requests. Credit balances are stored server-side via Firebase to prevent abuse. In-app purchases for credit packs are processed by Apple and managed via RevenueCat. We do not store payment information; all transactions are handled by Apple's App Store.

customSections.title: Anonymous Authentication
customSections.content: The Application uses Firebase Anonymous Authentication to associate your credit balance and usage with your device without requiring you to create an account or provide any personal information such as your name or email address.
